name: Pine Nut Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, lightly toast the pine nuts in the butter over medium heat until fragrant.
2. Remove from heat and let cool on paper towels.
3. Cook the Alphabet pasta in boiling water for 8-10 minutes or until al dente. Drain well and rinse with cold water to prevent overheating.
4. Gently mix together all ingredients, including the toasted pine nuts, cooked pasta, black olives, parsley, green onion, green bell pepper, red bell pepper, lemon juice, olive oil, and freshly ground pepper in a large bowl.
5. Cover the mixture and refrigerate until ready to serve.
The Chef's Comments:
"I'm not generally a huge pasta salad fan, but I thought I'd give it a whirl anyway. I made this one to go with BBQ'd hot dogs tonight. We haven't eaten it yet, but it looks intriguing." - Lisa
